name: create_contact
description: Create a new contact record in Front. Provide at minimum a handle (email, phone, or social) to identify them.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The full name of the contact.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description or note about the contact.

parameters.name: handles
parameters.description: List of contact handles. Each has 'handle' (value) and 'source' (email, phone, twitter, etc.).

parameters.name: custom_fields
parameters.description: Key-value pairs for custom contact fields defined in your workspace.
